title: Marketing Specialist DACH Region

notes: JD critical requirements covered: B2B marketing, trade fair/exhibition, GTM strategy, sales enablement, DACH region, HQ coordination
Chinese C2 prominently surfaced in both CV summary and Cover Letter para 1 — decisive advantage for China HQ role
B2B event execution appears in both IPC and GRG bullets with JD-aligned language
Cover Letter para 2 cites specific quantified outputs (4.6M CNY, 100+ clients) — strong signal density
Missing skills (Photoshop, Salesforce) acknowledged honestly in CL para 3 — appropriate framing
German B1+ framed as 'approaching B2' in both documents — honest, positive
All figures in CL (4.6M CNY, 100+ clients) trace directly to cv_tailored.md — no new numbers introduced
No skills added that are not in the CV (Photoshop, Salesforce correctly omitted)
No invented job responsibilities or company details
cv_changes.md documents removal of inferred HQ coordination bullet from GRG — correctly excluded from final output

structure: Para 1: Hook — why Dahua + unique value (Chinese C2, HQ coordination experience)
Para 2: Evidence — IPC and GRG B2B marketing specifics with numbers
Para 3: Cultural/language fit + honest gap acknowledgement (Photoshop, Salesforce)
notes: Four-paragraph structure correctly implemented
337 words — 63 words below limit, well-paced
Opening does not begin with 'I' — leads with role description and hook
Tone is confident and specific without being generic
cv_changes.md accurately reflects what changed: IPC moved to position 1, language order adjusted, trade fair bullet reworded
Chinese C2 note in Languages table matches CV content
No discrepancies found between cv_changes.md description and cv_tailored.md actual content
Skills sections match documented restructuring into 4 groups
CV and Cover Letter tell the same story from different angles — no contradiction
Match score 72/100 is solid for this role given the gap in graphic design tools
Honest framing of German B1+ and missing tools is coherent across both documents
Application package is internally consistent and professionally presented

risks.note: CV and CL frame as B1+ approaching B2. Honest disclosure — unlikely to disqualify but may be flagged at screening.
Acknowledged in CL. Dahua may expect hands-on design capability. Positioning as 'works with designers' is the correct mitigation.

recommendation: Package is ready for submission. The Chinese C2 advantage is well-positioned as a decisive differentiator. No fabrication, no structural issues, word count within limit.
